import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn flush(_ acc: List<Int>, _ buf: String) -> List<Int>
  if string.is_empty(buf)
    acc
  else
    match string.parse_int(buf)
    when Some(v)
      list.push(acc, v)
    when None
      acc
    end
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        nums = flush(nums, current)
        current = ""
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  nums = flush(nums, current)

  mut output = ""
  mut j = list.len(nums) - 1
  mut first = true
  while j >= 0
    match list.get(nums, j)
    when Some(v)
      if first
        output = "#{v}"
        first = false
      else
        output = "#{output} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j - 1
  end
  println(output)
end
